---
title: "Creating Lifecycle Open Science Time Series Data"
date: "2026-02-06"
date-modified: last-modified
# vignette: >
#   %\VignetteIndexEntry{Creating LOS Time Series Data}
#   %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
#   %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# Overview

Run this script to:

1. Generate linked resource histories (i.e., "badge histories") for all OSRs by month, which are used to compute lifecycle open science time series data.
2. Generate current subpopulation/segment memberships for all OSRs along attributes of interest (e.g., institution, provider, subject, etc.)
3. Generate lifecycle open science time series summaries by segment.


```{r}
library(cosr)

los_subgroup_summary_all(
  sample = expr_valid_regs,
  los_ts_path = "data/los_ts.parquet",
  subgroup_vars = SUPPORTED_ATTRIBUTES
)

# Compute time series summaries by subgroups
# subgroup_summaries <- function(subgroup_var, los_ts_path = "data/los_ts.parquet") {
#   ts_data <- open_dataset(los_ts_path)

#   ts_data |>
#     left_join(arrow::open_dataset(paste0(
#         "data/osr_",
#         tolower(subgroup_var),
#         ".parquet"
#       )) |>
#         select(node_id, !!sym(subgroup_var)),
#       by = "node_id"
#     ) |>
#     cosr::los_summarizer(lazy = FALSE, !!sym(subgroup_var), date)
# }

# # Assign subgroup memberships and write to disk
# subgroup_vars <- c(
#   "affiliated",
#   "institution",
#   "funder",
#   "funded",
#   "provider",
#   "subject",
#   "subject_parent",
#   "template"
# )
# purrr::walk(
#   .x = subgroup_vars
#   .f = ~ {
#     subgroup_summaries(.x) |>
#       write_parquet(paste0("data/los_ts_", tolower(.x), ".parquet"))
#   },
#   .progress = TRUE
# )

# Aggregate summary
los_ts <- arrow::open_dataset("data/los_ts.parquet") |>
  cosr::los_summarizer(lazy = FALSE, threshold = 0, date) |>
  write_parquet("data/los_ts_summary.parquet")
```
